title: Towards Mechanised Consensus in Isabelle
author: Marmsoler, Diego
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Provides a formalisation of a general Proof-of-Work protocol in Isabelle/HOL and a proof of   the common prefix property  .   A blockchain is modeled as a tree and accompanied by a function to check its validity  .   The model provides abstract characterizations of minings   and honest minings as special types thereof.   The protocol is   modeled as an inductively defined set of valid event traces, where each   event is either a honest or dishonest mining.
steps_raw: Provides a formalisation of a general Proof-of-Work protocol in Isabelle/HOL and a proof of   the common prefix property  .   A blockchain is modeled as a tree and accompanied by a function to check its validity  .   The model provides abstract characterizations of minings   and honest minings as special types thereof.   The protocol is   modeled as an inductively defined set of valid event traces, where each   event is either a honest or dishonest mining.
